inputs.titre: Fin de la guerre du Biafra

reason: The image shows a group of soldiers in a desert-like environment. They are wearing tan uniforms and holding rifles. The atmosphere seems to align with a conflict scenario. However, the rifles appear to be AK-47 variants or similar designs, which while present in the conflict, their ubiquity and modern appearance in the picture suggests a level of modernization that may not fully represent the conditions in 1970 Biafra. Also, the overall quality of clothing and equipment seems a bit too clean and new. I can see some modern-looking shoes
